The Solution

The Value
Automated accuracy in salary disbursement, highly configurable policies, and enterprise-grade security trusted by over 100 organizations.

About US 
Riddhasoft is a software development company established in 2016 that specializes in providing 
software solutions with high value. The company's mission is to deliver innovative and reliable 
software products and services that help customers achieve their business goals. The company 
offers a wide range of software development services, including custom software development, 
web and mobile application development, and software maintenance and support.

Riddhasoft has a team of experienced software developers, engineers, and other technology 
professionals who have the skills and expertise to create software solutions that meet the unique 
needs of each client. The company's goal is to help its clients stay ahead of the competition by 
providing cutting-edge software solutions that are designed to meet the ever-changing demands 
of the digital age.

About Nexora HRMS  
Nexora HRMS delivers organizations a modern, fully integrated human resource management solution 
that unifies attendance, HR, Performance Appraisal, Task Management and payroll operations into one 
intelligent and scalable platform. Designed to simplify workforce management, Nexora HRMS automates 
attendance tracking, leave management, and payroll processing—reducing manual effort, eliminating 
calculation errors, and ensuring accurate and timely salary disbursement.

With real-time data synchronization, structured approval workflows, and highly configurable policies, 
the system adapts seamlessly to the unique requirements of each organization. Its intuitive interface 
enhances user experience across HR teams, management, and employees, while advanced reporting 
and analytics empower leadership with actionable insights for confident decision-making. 
Built with enterprise-grade security and compliance standards, Nexora HRMS ensures data integrity,

confidentiality, and regulatory alignment. Trusted by over 100 organizations, the platform is stable, 
scalable, and continuously evolving to meet the growing demands of modern businesses. 
Nexora HRMS strengthens operational efficiency, improves workforce transparency, and enables 
organizations to focus on strategic growth while we handle the complexity of HR operations. 
Some of the key features of this product include:

Additionally, Nexora includes several other features designed to boost efficiency, enhance 
decision-making, and drive overall performance, ensuring a comprehensive solution 
tailored to your business needs.

Benefits from payroll module 
Nexora Payroll automates salary calculations, tax deductions, overtime, allowances, and statutory 
contributions with precision and accuracy. It reduces manual errors, ensures timely salary 
processing, and maintains full compliance with regulatory requirements. With configurable salary 
structures, approval workflows, and detailed reporting, organizations gain transparency,
efficiency, and complete control over payroll operations while saving valuable administrative time.

We understand the importance of a reliable and secure system for your organization and we 
assure you that our system is fully compliant with regulatory standards.

EHAJIRI

Smart Attendance, Automated Payroll

E-Hajiri is a dynamic and industry-leading attendance and payroll management system trusted by over 3,000 customers. With proven reliability and continuous innovation, ehajiri works seamlessly with a wide range of biometric and RFID attendance devices, ensuring real-time data capture and accurate employee tracking. Designed for ease-of-use, it automatically synchronizes attendance logs, shift schedules, and leave records without any manual intervention
. This integration allows organizations to efficiently monitor workforce attendance, streamline payroll calculations, and maintain compliance with company policies and labor regulations.

Attendance Management

Web-based attendance tracking and device synchronization

Graphical dashboards for attendance overview

Multiple biometric device support (Face, Fingerprint, Palm, Card)

Flexible shift scheduling and auto-shift support

Flexible leave and holiday management with Nepali/English calendars

Employee self-service portal (attendance review, leave application)

Multi-admin privileges and multi-branch support

Multi-language interface (English & Nepali)

Multi-language interface (English & Nepali)

Real-time data transmission

Attendance rules setup and compliance policies

Multi-format reports (CSV, PDF, XLS)

Automatic alerts & multi-level approvals

Scheduled backups

Payroll Management

Smart, Automated & Easy-to-Use Payroll Processing for Modern Organizations

The Payroll Management Module of eHajiri is designed to simplify and automate the entire salary-processing workflow for organizations. Integrated seamlessly with eHajiri’s Attendance & Leave Management System, it ensures that salaries, allowances, deductions, tax calculations, and approvals are handled with accuracy and zero manual effort.

With its intuitive interface and powerful automation, the module minimizes administrative workload while ensuring transparency, compliance, and efficiency.

Key Features of the Payroll Management Module

1. Allowance Management

Configure and manage different types of allowances such as:

- Basic salary-based allowances

- Position-based allowances

- Conditional and performance-based allowances

The system automatically fetches and applies allowances based on predefined rules.

2. Deduction Management

Define and apply various deductions:

- Late and early arrival deductions

- Loan & advance deductions

- Custom deduction policies

- Custom deduction policies

Integrated with attendance, the system calculates deductions automatically based on employee behavior and company policies.

3. Insurance Company Setup

Manage:

- Insurance company information

4. Tax Setup

A fully configurable tax engine where administrators can:

- Define tax slabs

- Set fiscal year rules

- Apply government-approved deductions and exemptions

Tax amounts are auto-calculated while generating salaries.

5. Late/Early Deduction Setup (Designation-wise)

A powerful tool to control discipline and productivity:

- Define late/early deduction rules per designation

- Integrates with the eHajiri attendance logs

- Auto-applies penalties in payroll

6. Payroll Configuration

Provides organization-level payroll control:

- Salary structure setup

- Salary cycle configuration

- Accounting and calculation settings

- Round-off and precision settings

7. Payroll Setup

7. Payroll Setup

Set up employee-specific payroll details:

- Salary components

- Bank details

- Allowances and deductions mapping

This acts as the master setup before processing monthly payroll.

8. Payroll Verification

A multi-level verification flow:

- Verify attendance

- Validate salary computation

- Review allowances, overtime, and deductions

Ensures accuracy before salary approval.

9. Salary Sheet

Auto-generated monthly salary sheet showing:

- Gross salary

- Net payable

- Gross salary

- Net payable

- Taxes

- Allowances

- Deductions

- Attendance impact

Easily exportable for accounting and audit purposes.

10. Salary Approval

A controlled approval mechanism:

- Department-wise approval

- Multi-level approval workflow

- Record of who approved and when

Ensures proper governance and compliance.

11. Salary Payment

Manage and record salary disbursements:

- Bank transfer reports

- Payment status tracking

- Salary acknowledgment records

- Salary acknowledgment records

12. Salary Payslip Generation

Generate payslips automatically:

- Employee-wise monthly payslips

- Printable or downloadable PDF

- Accurate reflection of attendance, overtime & deductions

Employees can view or download their payslips via the eHajiri portal.

Integration With eHajiri Attendance

The strength of this module comes from its seamless integration with eHajiri’s biometric and mobile attendance system:

- Automatic late/early deduction

- Automatic late/early deduction

- Auto Overtime calculation

- Attendance-based payroll generation

- Zero manual entry required

- High accuracy and transparency

Why eHajiri Payroll?

- Highly automated – minimal manual work

- Accurate salary calculations from attendance

- Easy-to-use interface with clean navigation

- Flexible and fully configurable

- Suitable for organizations of any size

- Integrated approval and verification workflow

- Integrated approval and verification workflow

- Reduces errors, saves time, and increases productivity

Human Resource Management

Human Resource Management

The Human Resource Management module in eHajiri provides a centralized and intelligent platform to manage employee records, roles, designations, and organizational structure. It streamlines HR operations by reducing manual work, improving data accuracy, and enabling better workforce planning. With seamless integration to attendance and payroll, HR teams can manage employees efficiently while ensuring transparency and compliance.

Employee master management

Employee onboarding management

Employee exit and clearance management

Shift and work schedule assignment

Leave policy and leave type configuration

Employee document management

Employee self-service portal

HR announcements and notices

Employee status and lifecycle management

HR reports and analytics

Answer: This document describes an ecosystem called "Nexora" which includes attendance management systems (e.g., Google Calendar), task productivity tools such as TaskMaster, performance appraisal software Systemwide benefits including real time synchronization across multiple applications, structured workflows, multi-level approval capabilities, and enterprise-grade security features. Question: What is payroll management
Answer: Payroll Management Module allows allowance management, deductibility policy configuration, etc., which helps streamline employee compensation processes.

Question: what is tax Management
Answer: Tax Management allows for setting up taxes through an integrated module called "Payroll Management". It includes features such as defining tax slab(s), applying federal regulations, calculating individualized income contributions, eliminating error calculations, automating payroll processing, automatic transfer between bank accounts, etc., all managed from this central platform. This makes it easy to set up complex taxation systems without having to manually input details every day.
